title: Onboarding - Eula page - License Agreement and Privacy Policy links when the internet is turned off
scenario: User taps License Agreement or Privacy Policy links on EULA page without internet and sees "Something went wrong" screen, then returns to "Well hello, first things first..." screen after tapping Cancel
steps: Turn off internet connection on the device.
Open the app and navigate to the EULA page.
expected: Tapping the License Agreement or Privacy Policy links should display the respective agreement content.
